positive: A minimalist, highly detailed silhouette of a wise owl perched on a crescent moon, surrounded by stylized glowing constellations and drifting crescent stars. The composition should be centered and symmetrical, utilizing strong black ink contrast against a light, cream background. Style: Neo-Art Deco mixed with modern celestial engraving. Details: Crisp line work, clean negative space, glowing ethereal accents, intricate feather patterns, geometric stellar maps. The overall mood is magical and serene, suitable for a sophisticated apparel print. Use limited palette of deep navy, gold foil accents, and black ink.
negative: blur, noise, watermark, text, signature, low detail, artifacts, grainy, muddy colors, poorly rendered hands, bad anatomy, cropped, out of frame
